long_description: At 2025-12-05 09:14 UTC IBM Cloud engineers have found to an issue accessing https://cloud.ibm.com. Customers attempting to access https://cloud.ibm.com to access existing VCFaaS instance or provision new VCFaaS instances may experience failed transactions. IBM Cloud engineers are currently investigating the issue and will continue to provide updates until the issue is resolved
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Unable to access cloud.ibm.com 
CI: vmware-directorsite
Parent INC/ warroom /Webex(if any): INC10481032 
Downstream Services impacted:
Impacted Env(s): ALL
Detection source: Dashboard
Caused by Change/Incident/Case/DevReq: Cloudflare Outage
SME Findings: sme-team: SME Findings
Teams paged: PDE7710194 : Paged LBaas team to check if their services were back
Reason of Escalation:
Resolution steps: Issue resolved after cloud flare fixed their system 
Cause Code: other: Service CIS
Signature of Issue:
Jira/Github/Other Tickets:
Category/Subcategory:
Timeline Summary:
times taken from main warroom #warroom-vpc-inc10481030
* 2025-12-05 09:00 UTC : Core team observed dashboards going red and found out that the cloudflare had an outage
* 2025-12-05 09:05 UTC : Core team opened a warroom warroom-vpc-inc10481030 and teams call open
* 2025-12-05 09:10 UTC : Core team noticed that the cloud.ibm.com page was not reachable and increased the severity to sev-2 CIE
* 2025-12-05 09:15 UTC : Corea team could see the provisioning dashboard recovering, but the cloud page was still down
* 2025-12-05 09:15 UTC : Cloudflare status page updated that they have fixed the issue https://www.cloudflarestatus.com/incidents/lfrm31y6sw9q
* 2025-12-05 09:20 UTC : cloud.ibm.com was accessible 
* 2025-12-05 09:25 UTC: Paged LB team PDE7710194 to check if their services were up and running.
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed / Not Available / URL
Caused by Change/Incident:
Warroom: #warroom-vcd-inc10481305
Meeting URL: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_ZmFjNzA5YmYtODViMS00OTZjLWIyNjktNDI0NTkyZTJhOTJm%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22fcf67057-50c9-4ad4-98f3-ffca64add9e9%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%223b98fa1e-3c72-4e87-86c6-2b3467c59008%22%7d
Outage Start: 2025-12-05 08:48 UTC
Outage End: 2025-12-05 09:18 UTC
Detection: 2025-12-05 09:14 UTC
Identification: 2025-12-05 09:17 UTC
Mitigation: 2025-12-05 09:17 UTC
CIE pilot/co-pilot/squad names: edcollins@ie.ibm.com/nishanth.kasturi@ibm.com
CORE Manager names: Jesus.Manuel.Diaz.Perez@ibm.com
Executives(VPs) names:
Team mitigated the CIE:
Next Update Time:
current_status_next_steps:
Impact is mitigated -
Child of CIE INC10481032
